Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl

Class ExecutionBranchStatement

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionNode<S>
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionBlockStartNode<BranchStatement>
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.ExecutionBranchStatement
All Implemented Interfaces:
IExecutionBlockStartNode<BranchStatement>, IExecutionBranchStatement, IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<BranchStatement>
public class ExecutionBranchStatement extends AbstractExecutionBlockStartNode<BranchStatement> implements IExecutionBranchStatement
The default implementation of IExecutionBranchStatement.
